entry.title: New: BILL010(25) (Honolulu) — CC-181(25) - Bill re-referred from Budget to International & Legal Affairs Committee.
entry.content:
RELATING TO REFUSE AND RECYCLABLE MATERIALS.

Authorizes the ENV, Refuse Division, to provide refuse and recyclable materials collection, processing, and disposal services to homestead associations upon request from the homestead association.

Latest action: CC-181(25) - Bill re-referred from Budget to International & Legal Affairs Committee.

View on the council site
